import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
from src.core.document import Document
doc = Document\('./test/test.docx'\)
print\('=== title ==='\)
print\(repr\(doc.title.text if doc.title else None\)\)
print\(\)
print\('=== abstract ==='\)
print\(repr\(doc.abstract.text if doc.abstract else None\)\)
print\(\)
print\('=== keywords ==='\)
print\(repr\(doc.keywords.text if doc.keywords else None\)\)
print\(\)
print\('=== sections ==='\)
for name, paras in doc.sections.items\(\):
    print\(f'[{name}] -> {len\(paras\)} paras'\)
    for p in paras[:2]:
        txt = p.text[:60]
        print\(f'  {txt}'\)
    if len\(paras\) > 2:
        print\(f'  ... +{len\(paras\)-2} more'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "E:/桌面/claude/w0rdF0rmat" && python -u -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
from docx import Document
doc = Document\('./test/test.docx'\)
print\(f'Total paragraphs: {len\(doc.paragraphs\)}'\)
print\(\)
for i, p in enumerate\(doc.paragraphs\):
    style = p.style.name if p.style else 'None'
    text = p.text[:80] if p.text else ''
    runs_info = ''
    if p.runs:
        r = p.runs[0]
        font_name = r.font.name if r.font.name else '?'
        font_size = r.font.size.pt if r.font.size else '?'
        bold = r.font.bold
        runs_info = f' | font={font_name}, size={font_size}, bold={bold}'
    print\(f'[{i:3d}] style=\\"{style}\\" | \\"{text}\\"{runs_info}'\)
" 2>&1)
